questions.question:
Which directories should count as a "service folder" for this ticket?

Why it matters: The phrase could mean only immediate folders under `src/main/services/`, every nested service directory such as `src/main/services/kernel/`, or any folder containing service-style modules. The ticket needs a clear completion boundary.
Recommended answer: Create or update a README in every immediate child directory of `src/main/services/`, and include nested subservice folders only when they already group multiple service modules behind their own index or boundary.

Should the README files be concise operational guides or more comprehensive architecture notes?

Why it matters: This determines the expected depth per folder and prevents either thin boilerplate or overlarge documents that duplicate code.
Recommended answer: Use concise but detailed operational guides: roughly 1-2 screens per service folder, focused on what the service owns, key files/exports, data flow, dependencies, side effects, and testing/debugging guidance.
questions.answer: Purpose, Architecture, Design, Interface, Workflow etc
